title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVIII. Games.
content:
Ride a cock-horse to Banbury-cross,
        To buy little Johnny a galloping-horse;
        It trots behind, and it ambles before,
        And Johnny shall ride till he can ride no more.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCVIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
